traps.description: from_string parses with int(float(amount) * 100), so binary-float error truncates everyday prices one cent low ("4.35" -> 434, "19.99" -> 1998). Fix uses decimal.Decimal with an explicit rounding mode.
add and subtract ignore the currency and silently combine raw cents, so USD and EUR get added together. Each must raise ValueError on a currency mismatch.

allocate uses integer division only and returns equal pieces, dropping the remainder (500 split 3 ways returns 498). Fix distributes leftover cents one each to the leading pieces so the parts sum back to the original.
